rooms.name: Pirate
rooms.paragraph: Navigate your way throughout the sinking ship and escape before you get captured! You have one hour to escape! Use the WASD keys to move and your mouse / spacebar to interact with clues / objects.

rooms.name: Casino
rooms.paragraph: Navigate your way throughout the casino and escape before you get captured! You have one hour to escape! Use the WASD keys to move and your mouse / spacebar to interact with clues / objects.

rooms.name: Horror
rooms.blurb: Escape from the carnival of terror!
rooms.paragraph: Navigate your way throughout the carnival and escape before you get captured! You have one hour to escape! Use the WASD keys to move and your mouse / spacebar to interact with clues / objects.
